name: Google Calendar
description: List, create, update and delete events in Google Calendar

credentials_required.label: Google OAuth Client ID
credentials_required.hint: Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client ID. Redirect URI must be set to: https://YOUR-N8N-URL/webhook/oauth-callback

credentials_required.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
credentials_required.hint: From the same OAuth 2.0 Client ID page in Google Cloud Console

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List upcoming calendar events. Parameters: calendar_id (default 'primary'), time_min (ISO date, optional), time_max (ISO date, optional), max_results (default 10)

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event. Parameters: summary (required), start (ISO datetime, required), end (ISO datetime, required), description (optional), location (optional), calendar_id (default 'primary')

tools.name: update_event
tools.description: Update an existing event. Parameters: event_id (required), summary (optional), start (optional), end (optional), description (optional), location (optional), calendar_id (default 'primary')

tools.name: delete_event
tools.description: Delete a calendar event. Parameters: event_id (required), calendar_id (default 'primary')

tools.name: list_calendars
tools.description: List all calendars accessible to the user. No parameters required.

author: freddy-schuetz
